channel.title: Pages on Patrick Nollet
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Patrick Nollet

item.title: Politique de confidentialité – Liturgie
item.description:
Dernière mise à jour : 8 mars 2026

L’application Liturgie ne collecte, ne stocke et ne transmet aucune donnée personnelle.

Aucune information n’est partagée avec des tiers.

Contact

Pour toute question relative à cette politique de confidentialité, vous pouvez contacter liturgie.ios@gmail.com.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a passionate builder who loves creating user-centric software products.

I have worked in various technical and management roles across different industries (B2B and B2C) and have co-founded two startups.

I graduated in Computer Science from École Polytechnique and Télécom ParisTech in 2010.

Experience

2024 - CTO at Tennaxia

Following the acquisition of Traace by Tennaxia, I joined the company as the CTO for ESG activities, and eventually became the company’s CTO.

I re-organized and led a team of 50+ engineers and product managers, working on multiple product lines with different technologies (Node, Java, React, Vue).
